product_overview: A multi-sport pickup game and social engagement platform that allows casual players, hosts, and sports communities to discover, join, create, and manage games across multiple sports while interacting socially through feeds, chat, and notifications. It integrates location-based discovery, payments, AI-powered recommendations, and detailed venue and user management.
core_goals: Enable users to discover and join pickup sports games across multiple sports and locations.
Support hosts and facility managers in creating, managing, and monetizing games and venues.
Foster an active social community with profiles, posts, messaging, achievements, and interactions.
Provide real-time updates, notifications, and communication for seamless user engagement.
Integrate secure, multi-country payment processing supporting various payment gateways.
Use AI to deliver personalized game and player recommendations based on preferences and history.
Ensure robust security, privacy, and compliance with standards like JWT authentication and GDPR.
key_features: Multi-sport game discovery with location-based search, real-time availability, and AI recommendations.
Game creation and management including invitations, RSVP, team formation, recurring events, and reminders.
Social feed featuring posts, stories, likes, comments, achievements, and player follow system.
Real-time chat system for individual and group messaging via WebSocket integration.
Venue and facility management tools for listing, booking, reviews, and analytics dashboards.
Comprehensive user profile management with statistics, achievements, and sport preferences.
Robust notification system supporting push notifications, email summaries, and updates.
Extensive search and filtering options including skill levels, game formats, and facility amenities.
Secure payment integration supporting multiple gateways like Stripe, PayPal, and local wallets.
Monitoring, analytics, rate-limiting, and security measures to ensure platform reliability and safety.
Cross-platform mobile apps built with React Native and backend leveraging microservices and REST APIs.
AI-powered personalized recommendations for games and friend connections.
user_flow_summary: User onboarding via email or social login with sport preferences, skill level and location setup.
Discover and join games through filtered lists or map views, view game details, pay and RSVP.
Create and host games with settings for sport type, capacity, pricing, recurrence, and team management.
Engage socially by posting photos/videos, commenting, liking, messaging, and following players.
Manage venues by listing facilities, setting prices, handling bookings, and monitoring analytics.
Receive notifications for game invitations, reminders, updates, social interactions, and cancellations.
validation_criteria: JWT-based authentication and role-based access control function securely and reliably.
Games can be created, updated, discovered, joined, and managed with real-time updates.
Payment transactions are processed securely across supported gateways with correct handling of cancellations and refunds.
Social feed and real-time chat features operate with low latency and accurate delivery.
Location services enable precise game and venue discovery with effective geographic filtering.
User profiles reflect accurate statistics, achievements, and preferences.
Notification system delivers timely and relevant push and email notifications.
AI recommendation engine provides relevant and personalized game suggestions.
Cross-platform mobile app UI is consistent, responsive, and aligns with the Nepal-inspired design theme.
System monitoring alerts and dashboards are active and reflecting accurate performance data.
Security measures including rate limiting and CORS are enforced to protect against malicious activities.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Complete JWT-based authentication system with role-based access control, user registration, login, and secure token management

features.name: Game Management
features.description: Comprehensive game CRUD operations with dynamic player counts, multiple game types, skill level matching, and geographic search

features.name: Real-time Chat System
features.description: WebSocket-based real-time chat system for game coordination and player communication

features.name: Payment Integration
features.description: Multi-country payment processing with support for various payment gateways including Stripe, PayPal, eSewa, Khalti, and UPI

features.name: Cricket Integration
features.description: Complete cricket scoring system with ball-by-ball tracking, live scorecards, player statistics, and multiple cricket formats

features.name: AI Recommendation Engine
features.description: AI-powered game recommendations based on user preferences, location, skill level, and historical data

features.name: Location Services
features.description: Geographic search and location-based game discovery with proximity matching and venue management

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: Comprehensive user profile system with statistics, achievements, sport preferences, and performance tracking

features.name: RSVP Management
features.description: Game registration system with waitlists, capacity management, and automated notifications

features.name: Notification System
features.description: Multi-channel notification system with email, push notifications, and in-app messaging

features.name: Multi-sport Support
features.description: Support for multiple sports including Football, Basketball, Cricket, Badminton, Tennis, Volleyball, Table Tennis, and Futsal

features.name: Rate Limiting & Security
features.description: Comprehensive security measures including rate limiting, CORS configuration, and security headers

features.name: Monitoring & Analytics
features.description: Comprehensive monitoring with Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards, and application health checks

features.name: Database Management
features.description: Database schema management with Flyway migrations and comprehensive data models

features.name: API Documentation
features.description: Comprehensive API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger integration and interactive documentation

features.name: Mobile UI Components
features.description: Reusable React Native components with Nepal-inspired design using flag colors and modern typography

features.name: State Management
features.description: Zustand-based state management for authentication, games, UI preferences, and user data

features.name: Docker Containerization
features.description: Complete Docker setup with multi-service architecture including database, cache, message queue, and monitoring

features.name: Testing Infrastructure
features.description: Comprehensive testing setup with unit tests, integration tests, and test utilities
